title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 144.660 - Director's powers as to returns
text:
144.660.  Director's powers as to returns. — The director of revenue has all the powers with regard to requiring monthly returns and extending the time for the payment of the tax levied by sections 144.600 to 144.745 that are provided in sections 144.090 and 144.160 with regard to the Missouri sales tax.
(L. 1959 H.B. 35 § 12)
